nasb.text: The news about them reached the ears of the church at Jerusalem, and they sent Barnabas off to Antioch.

esv.text: The report of this came to the ears of the church in Jerusalem, and they sent Barnabas to Antioch.

cnv.text: 這事傳到耶路撒冷教會的耳中，他們就派巴拿巴到安提阿去。

ccb.text: 耶路撒冷教会的人听到这消息后，就派巴拿巴去安提阿。

csbs.text: 这消息传到在耶路撒冷的教会，他们就派巴拿巴到安提阿去。
